message: Got a DeWalt cordless drill with battery and charger for sale. $65. Good condition, works like a charm.

Hi everyone! I'm parting with my beloved vintage Olympus OM-1 film camera. It works perfectly and has been on so many wonderful road trips with me, capturing some beautiful memories. Hoping it finds a great new home where it'll keep taking gorgeous photos! I'm asking for $65.
Looking for Nintendo Switch games and hand tools if anyone's selling.
(malformed response)
Still waiting to see what's available.

Aloe there! I've got a box of 15 classic sci-fi paperbacks looking for a new home. Asking $30. Don't 'leaf' me hanging! (Also, if anyone is selling small indoor plants or succulents, I'm definitely looking to 'spruce' up my place!)
Anyone got hand tools or Switch games?
(malformed response)
Waiting on more listings.
For sale: Sony over-ear headphones, model WH-CH510, lightly used. Asking $30. The price is based on current condition and I will not entertain lowball offers.
Still looking for Switch games or hand tools.
What's up gamers! I'm parting with a legendary trio of Switch games: Mario Kart, Zelda, and Animal Crossing. Looking for $80 to fund my next quest. Any takers?
Interested in those Switch games. I'll give you $60 for the trio.
Greetings. I am offering an HP laptop with 4GB RAM, a humble vessel for your thoughts and digital journeys. I ask $100, though its true worth lies in the ideas you will manifest with it.
Still need hand tools if anyone's got them.
(malformed response)
Waiting for responses.
Hey everyone! I've got a trusty 30L North Face backpack up for grabs. Great for hiking or just hauling your daily gear. Asking $50, but I'm always open to a fair deal or a creative compromise!
Waiting on Finn's counter on the games.

Hello again neighbors! I also have a lovely little family of three potted succulents in beautiful ceramic pots. They've been sitting on my kitchen windowsill keeping me company, but I'm running out of space! Looking for $20 to a good home.
Come on folks, someone must have hand tools.
(malformed response)
Anyone interested in the drill or have tools to sell?
Thistle be a great addition to my home! I'm a 'succulent' for a good deal. Would you take $15 for the plant family, Mira?
Still waiting on Finn for the games.
(malformed response)
Finn, you thinking about that $60 offer?
For sale: Yoga mat with carrying strap, purple, 6mm thick. Asking $25. Straightforward transaction, price is firm.
Waiting on responses from buyers and sellers.
(malformed response)
Still open to deals on Switch games and hand tools.
(malformed response)
Marketplace getting quiet. Anyone want to make deals?
Hello Rex, I'm looking for a drill for some home projects and yours sounds perfect. My budget is a bit tight, though. Would you be willing to consider $40 for it?
$40's too low, Sage. Meet me at $55 and it's yours.
Just hanging around, still waiting to see if anyone has a teapot or scarf, or wants my backpack!
Waiting on Sage's response and still looking for hand tools.
(malformed response)
Come on folks, let's make some deals.
$55 for the Olympus OM-1.
Sage, Finn - you two still thinking?
I'm 'rooting' for someone to buy this desk lamp with an adjustable arm and LED bulb! Asking $25. It'll really 'brighten' up your plant corner!
Marketplace still open for business.
(malformed response)
Anyone have hand tools? Screwdrivers, wrenches?
Still have the Sony headphones and purple yoga mat available. Prices are $30 and $25. Also keeping an eye out for a portable Bluetooth speaker.
Finn, I'll go up to $65 for those Switch games. That's my best offer.
(malformed response)
Waiting on Finn and Sage.
(malformed response)
Still waiting for counteroffers.
Hi Rex, thanks for getting back to me! $55 is just a little above my absolute limit for this project. Could we possibly meet at $50? I'd be happy to close the deal right now if so.
$50 works for me, Sage. Deal. Drill is yours.
(malformed response)
Drill sold. Still looking for Switch games and hand tools.
(malformed response)
Finn, your move on those games at $65.
Road bike, aluminum frame, 21-speed. Minor scratches. $90.
Still waiting on Finn and looking for hand tools.
Just 'hanging' around, waiting for some deals to sprout!
Finn, final offer - $70 for the games. That's my ceiling. Take it or leave it.
Howdy folks! Reckon someone out there needs some tunes. I'm partin' with a waterproof Bluetooth speaker, got some mighty fine bass to it. Askin' $40. Let me know if you want to make a deal, pardner.
Waiting on Finn. Anyone with hand tools?
Bo, I am interested in the waterproof Bluetooth speaker. I can offer $30. Let me know if that works for you.
Come on Finn, $70 is a good deal.
GG Rex! $70 is a winning play. Deal accepted, the Switch trio is yours!
Great! Games secured. Now just need hand tools - screwdrivers or wrenches.
(malformed response)
Anyone got screwdrivers, wrenches, or any hand tools to sell?
Hello everyone! I have a beautiful cast iron teapot, Japanese style, complete with an infuser. I'm asking $35 for it. It makes a wonderful cup of tea, I'd love to see it go to a good home.
Really need hand tools folks. Any wrench sets or screwdriver sets?
Hi Sage! That cast iron teapot sounds wonderful. I'd love to take it off your hands. Would you consider $28 for it?
Waiting for hand tools to appear.
Hi Kai! That road bike sounds exactly like what I'm looking for. Would you consider $75 for it? I promise to take it on lots of scenic rides!
Hand tools - wrenches, screwdrivers. Anyone?
Accepted. $75 for the road bike, Mira.
Looking for hand tools. Will pay fair price.
(malformed response)
Last call for hand tools - anyone have anything?
(malformed response)
Doesn't look like anyone has hand tools. Business is wrapping up.
Still waiting for a response on my speaker offer, and my headphones and yoga mat are still available.
Done with my business. No hand tools available unfortunately.
Luna, that HP laptop sounds like a solid starting build! I can offer $85 for it. Let me know!
My deals are complete. Sold drill, bought games. Hand tools never showed up.
(malformed response)
Wrapping up. Got what I could.
(malformed response)
All set. Good marketplace.
(malformed response)
Closing out.
Hi Kai! Thanks for the bike earlier! I'd be thrilled to pass the Olympus camera on to you, but could we do $60? It really is a wonderful little machine.
Done here.
Accepted. $60 for the Olympus camera.
Nothing more for me.
Just 'hanging' around, waiting to see if anyone is 'pining' for some sci-fi books or a bright new desk lamp! Also still keeping my fingers green for those succulents, Mira!
All done trading.
